runTitle: Production AI Negative Feedback Trace E2E - TraceId Preserved + Feedback Success
skippedSurfaces: Cloud Run /monitoring/traces?q=<negative feedback traceId> exact match (sampling 10% caused same-run miss)

expertAssessments.rationale: Production AI sidebar free-text query 이후 negative feedback click까지 수행했고 브라우저 캡처 기준 feedback POST body에 32-hex traceId가 포함되며 응답 langfuseStatus=success를 확인했다.
동일 traceId로 Cloud Run /monitoring/traces?q=<traceId>를 즉시 및 25초 후 재조회했지만 count=0이었다. 이는 현재 sampleRate 10% 특성상 same-run correlation이 비결정적이라는 기존 운영 제약과 일치한다.

completedImprovements.title: Negative feedback traceId preserved through feedback submission
completedImprovements.evidence: Production feedback POST body now contains traceId 3bcee9e677877ddd61faed5543c577ad and returns langfuseStatus=success.

notes: Browser-captured POST /api/ai/feedback body included traceId 3bcee9e677877ddd61faed5543c577ad for negative feedback and returned langfuseStatus=success.
Cloud Run /monitoring/traces?q=3bcee9e677877ddd61faed5543c577ad&limit=5&includeAuxiliary=true returned count=0 both immediately and after ~25 seconds.
This run confirms feedback trace preservation and Langfuse scoring recovery for the negative path, but does not claim same-run monitoring correlation because sampling remains non-deterministic.

links.label: Cloud Run monitoring trace lookup for negative feedback traceId
